mapper.select: select id, user_name as userName, skill_name as skillName, display_name as displayName, description, scope, source, source_url as sourceUrl, version, enabled, install_path as installPath, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_skill_configs where user_name = #{userName} and scope = 'user' order by source asc, created_at desc

select id, user_name as userName, skill_name as skillName, display_name as displayName, description, scope, source, source_url as sourceUrl, version, enabled, install_path as installPath, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_skill_configs where user_name = #{userName} and enabled = 1 and scope = 'user' order by source asc, created_at desc

select id, user_name as userName, skill_name as skillName, display_name as displayName, description, scope, source, source_url as sourceUrl, version, enabled, install_path as installPath, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_skill_configs where scope = 'shared' order by source asc, created_at desc

select id, user_name as userName, skill_name as skillName, display_name as displayName, description, scope, source, source_url as sourceUrl, version, enabled, install_path as installPath, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_skill_configs where id = #{id}

select id, user_name as userName, skill_name as skillName, display_name as displayName, description, scope, source, source_url as sourceUrl, version, enabled, install_path as installPath, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_skill_configs where skill_name = #{skillName} and user_name = #{userName}

select id, user_name as userName, skill_name as skillName, display_name as displayName, description, scope, source, source_url as sourceUrl, version, enabled, install_path as installPath, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt from zephyr_skill_configs where skill_name = #{skillName} and scope = #{scope}
mapper.insert: insert into zephyr_skill_configs (id, user_name, skill_name, display_name, description, scope, source, source_url, version, enabled, install_path, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{userName}, #{skillName}, #{displayName}, #{description}, #{scope}, #{source}, #{sourceUrl}, #{version}, #{enabled}, #{installPath}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from zephyr_skill_configs where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
mapper.update: update zephyr_skill_configs set enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id} and user_name = #{userName}
update zephyr_skill_configs set enabled = #{enabled} where id = #{id}
